name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem this feature solves.
     "As a [role], I need [capability] because [reason]" is a useful format. -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what you want draftedi to do. Be specific about
     inputs, outputs, and behavior changes. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What have you tried or considered? Why is this approach better? -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How will you know this feature is complete?
     List observable, testable outcomes. -->

## Additional Context
<!-- EDI standards affected (X12, EDIFACT, etc.), related specs, transaction sets, prior art, links. -->
